data.title: Scalability Infrastructure
data.description: Implement cloud-based solutions to handle increased loads seamlessly.
data.technical_spec: Utilize AWS/Azure for horizontal scaling with load balancers.

data.title: Microservices Design
data.description: Break down functionalities into independent services for efficient management.

data.title: Data Redundancy Systems
data.description: Ensure data is replicated across multiple locations to prevent loss.
data.technical_spec: Deploy multi-zone databases and leverage CDN networks.

data.title: API Gateway Integration
data.description: Centralize API services to streamline interactions and security.
data.technical_spec: Employ API management tools like Kong or AWS API Gateway.

data.title: Serverless Architecture
data.description: Leverage on-demand cloud functions to reduce operational overhead.
data.technical_spec: Implement AWS Lambda functions for asynchronous processing.
